inputs.description: Implement Task 1 from the plan: Create scripts/chat/plan_models.py with all shared Pydantic models (InterpretationPlan, ExecutionStep, ScholarlyDirective, StepAction, typed params, step output types, ExecutionResult, ScholarResponse, GroundingData, RecordSummary, AgentSummary, GroundingLink, SessionContext). Also create tests/scripts/chat/test_plan_models.py. Follow the TDD steps in the plan exactly. Also extract _generate_primo_url from app/api/metadata.py to scripts/utils/primo.py as noted in the Review-Driven Amendments.
inputs.testCommand: cd /home/hagaybar/projects/rare-books-bot && poetry run pytest tests/scripts/chat/test_plan_models.py -v 2>&1 | tail -40
